_publications._publicationTitle: Metalloproteinase 1 downregulation in neurofibromatosis 1: Therapeutic potential of antimalarial hydroxychloroquine and chloroquine.

_contextSnippet: Lysosomal swelling was only weakly observed in BafA-treated cells
details: 5 nM BafA only weakly induced lysosomal swelling compared to CQ and HCQ
